faq.title: Answers before you switch your booking workflow
faq.description: Common questions about online booking, staff management, memberships, payments, and customer-facing booking pages.

booking.question: How does booking work?
booking.answer: You create services, set availability, publish your booking page, and customers choose an open slot. Confirmed bookings appear in your dashboard with customer details.

staff.question: Can I manage staff?
staff.answer: Yes. You can invite team members, assign services, manage availability, and keep bookings aligned with who is available to deliver each service.

online.question: Can customers book online?
online.answer: Yes. Each business can publish a customer-facing booking page where visitors select services, pick time slots, and submit bookings from desktop or mobile.

memberships.question: Do you support memberships?
memberships.answer: Yes. ServiceFlow supports membership plans for recurring revenue, customer perks, and ongoing customer relationships.

payments.question: Is payment integration available?
payments.answer: Yes. The platform includes Stripe-powered billing flows for plans, memberships, and subscription management.

analytics.question: Can ServiceFlow help teams make smarter scheduling decisions?
analytics.answer: Yes. ServiceFlow helps teams understand demand patterns, spot scheduling gaps, and make faster operational decisions from connected booking data.

cta.title: Bring discovery, bookings, customers, memberships, and payments into one workspace
cta.description: Start with a trial, configure your services, and publish a booking experience your customers can trust.

footer.description: Premium booking and discovery software for service businesses that want a calmer way to manage bookings, customers, teams, and revenue.
